text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: As we strive to develop medicines and solutions that can make lives better, we do so with patients at the heart. See how the journeys of people like Rhonda, Mike, and Tenia fuel our ambition to make possibilities real.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Explore the real life stories that inspire us to create medicines that make a difference.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Get to know the people making our breakthroughs possible.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our teams pursue answers to some of the toughest health challenges.

teaser.description: We partner with patients, patient organizations, caregivers and clinicians to ensure that individual experiences, perspectives, needs and priorities are part of our clinical development process.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Innovating to meet patient needs

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: We work to improve health outcomes for patients globally

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our patient support programs help prescribed patients reach their full treatment potential through disease education and access resources.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: We support educational programs that equip patients, their families and caregivers with the knowledge and resources to understand and manage their diseases.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our patient support programs help prescribed patients reach their full treatment potential through disease education and access resources.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: AbbVie supports independent education for experienced healthcare providers and scientists studying current, new and emerging science.
